query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A white bird in flight against a dark brown background, with wings extended wide in an outstretched position.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A white bird in flight rendered as a soft, indistinct form through intentional motion blur, with wings dissolving into streaked, ghostly shapes against a dark brown background. The subject loses all sharp detail, becoming an abstract study of movement and light rather than a clearly identifiable creature.
